findings.evidence: `Diagram.lean:61-77` defines `GridState`, exposes `equivPerm`, and installs `Fintype`; `StateCardinality.lean:5-8` imports only Mathlib basics plus `TauCeti.KnotTheory.Grid.Diagram`, showing the new API has no later grid dependency.
findings.fix: Move this section into `TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/Diagram.lean` near `GridState.equivPerm`/the `Fintype` instance, or at least keep the core `equivPerm_*`, `card`, `card_univ`, and `natCard` facts there before later grid theory imports it.
findings.issue: The declarations from `equivPerm_apply` through the small-grid instances depend only on `GridState.equivPerm`, `pointSet`, and the `Fintype` instance from `TauCeti.KnotTheory.Grid.Diagram`, so this broadly useful basic API is split away from the canonical home of `GridState`.

summary: The new cardinality API is basic `GridState` infrastructure but is placed in a separate leaf module instead of the canonical grid-state definition file. Imports otherwise look directly scoped.
